operations.title: List TinyCloud account applications
operations.description: List the application manifests registered in the selected owner's TinyCloud account.

cli.reason: Existing account and KV Commander commands remain the CLI surface.

operations.title: List TinyCloud account spaces
operations.description: List the spaces registered in the selected owner's TinyCloud account.

cli.reason: Existing account and KV Commander commands remain the CLI surface.

operations.title: TinyCloud active capabilities
operations.description: Inspect validated active runtime capabilities for the selected profile.

operations.title: Import TinyCloud delegation
operations.description: Validate, activate, and persist one request-bound runtime delegation.

operations.title: Request TinyCloud capabilities
operations.description: Create or recover an exact stored request from a canonical operation planner.

operations.title: TinyCloud authentication status
operations.description: Inspect the selected TinyCloud profile's safe authentication status.

operations.title: Delete a TinyCloud KV value
operations.description: Delete one exact KV key, optionally only when its ETag still matches.

cli.reason: Existing account and KV Commander commands remain the CLI surface.

operations.title: Get a TinyCloud KV value
operations.description: Read one exact key with a node-enforced one MiB response limit.

cli.reason: Existing account and KV Commander commands remain the CLI surface.

operations.title: Inspect TinyCloud KV metadata
operations.description: Read metadata for one exact key without downloading its value.

cli.reason: Existing account and KV Commander commands remain the CLI surface.

operations.title: List TinyCloud KV keys
operations.description: List keys at one exact prefix in a delegated TinyCloud space.

cli.reason: Existing account and KV Commander commands remain the CLI surface.

operations.title: Write a TinyCloud KV value
operations.description: Create, conditionally replace, or explicitly upsert one exact KV key.

cli.reason: Existing account and KV Commander commands remain the CLI surface.

operations.title: Get a TinyCloud secret
operations.description: Read and decrypt one secret from the selected TinyCloud secrets space.

operations.title: Execute a TinyCloud SQLite DML statement
operations.description: Run exactly one parameterized INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE against one exact TinyCloud SQLite database. Approving tinycloud.sql/write grants full read/write/schema mutation authority over this exact database; the MCP tool itself accepts only one parameterized INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE.

acknowledgeDatabaseWideAuthority.description: Approving tinycloud.sql/write grants full read/write/schema mutation authority over this exact database; the MCP tool itself accepts only one parameterized INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE.

authorityNotice.const: Approving tinycloud.sql/write grants full read/write/schema mutation authority over this exact database; the MCP tool itself accepts only one parameterized INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE.
Approving tinycloud.sql/write grants full read/write/schema mutation authority over this exact database; the MCP tool itself accepts only one parameterized INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE.

cli.reason: Existing SQL Commander commands remain the CLI surface.

operations.title: Query a TinyCloud SQLite database
operations.description: Run exactly one parser-approved SELECT against one exact TinyCloud SQLite database. Result limits are requested from the node and verified locally without silent truncation.

cli.reason: Existing SQL Commander commands remain the CLI surface.

operations.title: Inspect a TinyCloud SQLite schema
operations.description: List user tables, views, indexes, and triggers in one exact TinyCloud SQLite database using a fixed read-only query.

cli.reason: Existing SQL Commander commands remain the CLI surface.

operations.title: TinyCloud status
operations.description: Inspect the selected TinyCloud profile's safe local status.
